content.full_text:
August 16, 1990

Mr. Scott Hallabrin  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J St.  
Sacramento, CA 95814  

Steve White  
918 W. Lincoln Ave.  
Anaheim, CA 92805  

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

I am a member of the North Orange County Community College District Board of Trustees. I was appointed to the seat in Area 1 in November 1988. In 1989, I married my wife who was and is a registered nurse.

Rosamond, my wife, was teaching an Adult Education class in Childbirth Education in the evenings for the District prior to my appointment. She has continued to do so as a part-time instructor and would prefer to continue teaching.

I have abstained from voting on the one occasion her particular position appeared as an item on the Board agenda because I felt there was a conflict of interest. My question is would Cal. Gov. Code Section 87100 require me to disqualify myself from participating in consideration of faculty salaries and similar issues?

If so, Rosamond intends to resign from teaching. I realize that my question is lacking in specifics but what I need is general advice. The Fall semester is about to start and we would appreciate a call as soon as possible.

Thank You,

Steve White  
(714) 774-9462
